---
title: "Contact"
---

# Contact

**Mesfin Genie, PhD**  
Senior Lecturer in Health Economics  
Newcastle Business School  
The University of Newcastle, Australia

Email: [mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au](mailto:mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au)

## Profiles

- [University of Newcastle profile](https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ)
- [LinkedIn](https://au.linkedin.com/in/mesfin-genie-ph-d-65634216)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/DrGenie)
